text: We are going to sign the contract on Friday.
What are your priorities for this project?
The pro plan is more reliable than the basic one.
I would recommend the pro plan for your team.
We are going to sign the agreement today.
I am ready to close the deal. But first, can we negotiate the price on a two-year contract?
Of course. If you sign a two-year contract, we will give a ten percent discount.
That is good. And the warranty? The system must be reliable for our operations.
The warranty is two years, and the deposit is twenty percent. If you accept, we will include free installation.
I accept the terms. We have an agreement. Let us sign it now.
Excellent. We are going to sign the agreement today. Welcome to TVT, Diana. We closed the deal.
If you sign today, we will give a discount.
I accept the terms. We have an agreement.
Let us sign the agreement and close the deal.

Hi Rafael, this is Diana from Costa Logistics. We met on Wednesday afternoon, as we scheduled, and the meeting was great. I am ready to close the deal and sign the agreement for the pro plan. I have one last question about the terms. If we sign a two-year contract, will you give us a better discount? Our budget is tight this quarter, so the price is important for us. Also, we need a clear warranty, because the system must be reliable for our operations. If you can include free installation, we are going to sign today. Please send me the final agreement, and I will review the terms with my team. I think this is going to be a strong partnership. Thank you for your patience during the whole process. I look forward to closing the deal with you.

Hi, this is Rafael. I just finished the final meeting with Diana, and I have good news. She is going to sign the agreement for the pro plan today. We negotiated the terms together. She asked for a better discount on a two-year contract, so I offered ten percent and free installation. If she signs today, we will start the project next week. I explained the warranty clearly, because reliability is her main concern. The deposit is twenty percent, and she accepted it without a problem. I am going to send the final agreement this afternoon, and she will review the terms with her team. This is the biggest deal of the quarter for us. I am very proud of the whole team. We worked hard, and now we are going to close it.

Diana meets Rafael on Wednesday to discuss the final agreement. She asks for a better discount on a two-year contract. Rafael offers ten percent and free installation, and he explains the warranty. Diana accepts the terms and the deposit. Finally, they sign the agreement and close the deal.
Can you give us a discount?
If you sign today, we will give a discount.
Let us sign the agreement and close the deal.
I accept the terms. We have an agreement.
